# ShopOS

> AI-powered business management for small shops in India — GST invoicing, inventory, customers, expenses, and WhatsApp billing in one app.

ShopOS helps shop owners run day-to-day operations: create GST-compliant invoices, track inventory and low-stock alerts, manage customer ledgers and partial payments, log expenses, and share bills over WhatsApp.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview and sign-in entry point.
- [Sign in](/login): Existing customers sign in with email or Google.
- [Create account](/register): Start a free 7-day trial.
- [Subscribe](/subscribe): Pricing and UPI activation flow for the ₹499/month plan.
